problem: Review and synthesize the 64keys reverse engineering strand findings (3f0f38f7) to produce actionable implementation specifications for chart combinations, HD ontology, and visualization system
goal: Transform raw strand findings into concrete: (1) Implementation roadmap, (2) Python API specifications, (3) HD ontology JSON, (4) Chart visualization design spec, (5) Rebecca Energy color palette

implemented: Clean raw vs semantic separation pattern

review_tasks: Extract concrete API specifications from researcher findings
Create comprehensive HD ontology JSON from all findings
Specify channel formation logic and definition calculation
Design Rebecca Energy color palette (deep purples, gold/amber, forest greens)

output_requirements.detail_level: Sufficient for implementation without further research
output_requirements.code_examples: Include Python class signatures and logic pseudocode

constraints: Work in git fork space (automatic isolation branch)
Use findings from strand 3f0f38f7 as primary input
Maintain raw vs semantic separation pattern
Align with existing codebase architecture (Pydantic models, type hints)
All artifacts committed to fork, NOT main branch
success_criteria: HD ontology JSON covers Types, Authorities, Profiles, Channels, Definitions
Channel formation logic fully specified (when do gates form channels?)
Rebecca Energy color palette defined with hex codes and usage rules
5-week implementation roadmap with priorities and dependencies
All specifications validated against existing patterns

tasks.task: Design InteractionChart, PentaChart, TransitOverlay models with full API. Specify: __init__ methods, calculation logic, serialization. Include GateAPI methods: get_interaction(), get_penta(), overlay_transit(). Maintain raw vs semantic separation.

Create HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json covering: Types (Manifestor/Generator/ManGen/Projector/Reflector), Authorities (Sacral/Emotional/Splenic/etc), Profiles (1/3, 2/4, etc), Channels (36 with semantics), Definitions (Single/Split/Triple/Quad), Quarters, Angles. Include 64keys terminology mappings.
tasks.format: Structured JSON suitable for programmatic access and UI generation

3_channel_logic_specification.description: Specify channel formation and definition calculation logic

tasks.task: Document channel formation rules: When do two gates create a defined channel? How are electromagnetic connections detected (same gate in two charts)? How to calculate definition types (Single/Split/Triple/Quad)? Provide pseudocode and edge cases.
tasks.input_context: channels.yaml, researcher findings on interaction mechanics
tasks.output_format: Executable logic specification with test cases

4_visual_design.description: Design color palette and chart visualization architecture

tasks.task: Create Rebecca Energy color palette (JSON with hex codes, semantic meanings, usage rules). Design SVG chart visualization architecture: element hierarchy, coordinate system, responsive layout, interaction states. Reference researcher findings on Rebecca Energy aesthetic.

5_validation.description: Validate all specifications against existing architecture

tasks.task: Cross-check API design, ontology, and specifications against existing patterns: Pydantic model conventions, type hints, raw vs semantic separation, GateAPI patterns. Identify any architectural inconsistencies or missing considerations.

6_synthesis.description: Synthesize all specifications into actionable implementation roadmap

tasks.task: Create 5-week implementation roadmap: Week 1 (Channel logic + InteractionChart), Week 2 (PentaChart + Type/Authority), Week 3 (SVG renderer + colors), Week 4 (64keys endpoints + MCP tools), Week 5 (UI integration + testing). Include dependencies, priorities, validation checkpoints.
tasks.output_format: Actionable plan with clear acceptance criteria per week

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
